title: Berger-Hopf Standard Model v1.0.0: Complete Internal Boundary No-Fit Package
description: Release v1.0.0 of the Berger-Hopf Standard Model repository, exporting a complete internal boundary no-fit prediction package with external empirical comparison implemented as a separate comparison-only layer.
notes: All rights reserved. DOI pending until Zenodo archives the GitHub v1.0.0 release.
